response.raw_text:
{
  "topology_plan": [
    "Locate fac_churn_rate node in the graph.",
    "fac_churn_rate is observable; find its data.value and data.raw_value.",
    "Current value is 0.03 (raw: 3, unit: %).",
    "User requests to set churn rate to 5%.",
    "Edit is non-structural (update_node only); no topology change needed.",
    "Update fac_churn_rate data.value to 0.05 and data.raw_value to 5."
  ],
  "operations": [
    {
      "op": "update_node",
      "path": "/nodes/fac_churn_rate/data/value",
      "value": 0.05,
      "old_value": 0.03,
      "impact": "low",
      "rationale": "Sets churn rate to 5% per user request — reflects new observed value."
    },
    {
      "op": "update_node",
      "path": "/nodes/fac_churn_rate/data/raw_value",
      "value": 5,
      "old_value": 3,
      "impact": "low",
      "rationale": "Aligns raw value with updated churn rate percentage."
    }
  ],
  "removed_edges": [],
  "warnings": [],
  "coaching": {
    "summary": "The monthly churn rate has been updated to 5% to reflect recent data. No causal structure or outcome relationships were changed. Models using churn rate will show higher customer loss risk.",
    "rerun_recommended": true
  }
}

topology_plan: Locate fac_churn_rate node in the graph.
fac_churn_rate is observable; find its data.value and data.raw_value.
User requests to set churn rate to 5%.
Edit is non-structural (update_node only); no topology change needed.
Update fac_churn_rate data.value to 0.05 and data.raw_value to 5.

operations.rationale: Sets churn rate to 5% per user request — reflects new observed value.
Aligns raw value with updated churn rate percentage.

coaching.summary: The monthly churn rate has been updated to 5% to reflect recent data. No causal structure or outcome relationships were changed. Models using churn rate will show higher customer loss risk.
